campaignTrail_temp.questions_json = [ { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2001, "fields": { "description": "Rubio, you have just defeated Hillary Rodham Clinton in a large victory as expected by pollsters for months, flipping 9 states, becoming President after 2 terms of Barack Obama, and you are the first ever Hispanic POTUS. As you prepare for your inauguration speech, what tone do you want to set for the country during these times?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2003, "fields": { "description": "Republicans control Congress, and many conservatives want immediate action on Obamacare. How aggressively will your administration approach healthcare reform during your first year?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2005, "fields": { "description": "You have just appointed Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court, and conservatives want this White House to keep moving hard on the courts. How do you want to handle judicial nominations in your term?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2007, "fields": { "description": "UK's new Prime Minister Jeremy Corbyn is under pressure, Brexit is still a mess, and the world does not feel all that stable. How do you want to handle foreign policy, and what kind of tone should America take toward Britain and Europe?", "likelihood": 0.5 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2009, "fields": { "description": "Trade is now becoming a major fight inside the GOP. NAFTA is under fire, TPP is hanging around like an old argument nobody wants to finish, and workers in the Rust Belt want answers. What do you want to do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2011, "fields": { "description": "Congress is pushing a big domestic package, and everyone wants to know what kind of president you want to be. Do you want a clean tax cut, a broader growth bill, or something bigger?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2013, "fields": { "description": "Immigration is back at the center of the fight. The base wants toughness, business groups want certainty, and a lot of voters want the system to actually work. What do you want to do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2015, "fields": { "description": "The 2018 midterms are here, and the party is split between people who want to run on your record and people who just want to keep their heads down. What kind of message should Republicans run on?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2017, "fields": { "description": "Now that the midterms are behind you, Congress wants to know what your next big push is. What should the administration make its priority?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2019, "fields": { "description": "The war in Afghanistan has dragged on for years, and voters are getting tired of hearing about it. At the same time, there is still pressure to stay tough on our enemies. What do you want to do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2021, "fields": { "description": "You have decided to keep Nikki Haley after rumours of a new VP were heard in the media. How do you want to announce your re-election campaign?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2023, "fields": { "description": "Mass protests have erupted in Hong Kong against the Chinese government. Congress is considering legislation supporting the protesters, while business leaders warn that further tensions could damage relations with Beijing. What should your administration do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2025, "fields": { "priority": -6, "description": "The Democratic primary is getting serious, with candidates like Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg & Elizabeth Warren looking strong. Bernie Sanders is starting to look like the front-runner however, and he is polling very well in the ash heap that is the Rust Belt. What should your campaign be looking for on the other side?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2027, "fields": { "description": "Reports of a new virus called COVID-19 are spreading fast, and officials are warning that the virus may become a serious public health issue. What do you want to do first?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2029, "fields": { "description": "The virus is spreading, markets are wobbling, and businesses are starting to shut down. What kind of economic response do you want?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2031, "fields": { "description": "Pressure is building to reopen the economy, but public health officials are warning that moving too quickly could trigger another wave. How do you want to proceed?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2033, "fields": { "description": "Bernie Sanders has chosen Senator Kamala Harris as his running mate. Democrats say the pick gives the ticket energy, discipline, and a stronger appeal to younger voters and minorities. Republicans are already loading up on attack lines. What do you do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2035, "fields": { "description": "Rubio, George Floyd has been killed in police custody and protests are spreading across the country. Some are peaceful, some are turning ugly, and the whole country feels tense. What do you do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2037, "fields": { "description": "The Republican convention is coming up, and the campaign wants one big speaker to set the tone. Who should get the main slot?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2039, "fields": { "priority": -5, "description": "In the environment of COVID-19, rallies have been completely altered. Bernie is doing in person rallies with masks on, Amash is putting no rules in place for his rallies, and the nation, and especially your base, are wondering what you'll do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2041, "fields": { "priority": -4, "description": "Your campaign has a few different ways of reaching out to the people. How do you want to manage your campaign and visits the next couple of months? " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2043, "fields": { "priority": -3, "description": "What message does your 2020 campaign want to emphasize as we get day by day closer to election night, and probably week?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2045, "fields": { "priority": -3, "description": "Ruth Bader Ginsburg has just died, and with this you could make the court more conservative than it has been in decades. It's up to you now Rubio, do you want to motivate the base or appeal to moderates?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2047, "fields": { "priority": -2, "description": "After RBG dying, people are wondering your stances on Roe v Wade & Obergefell. Liberals are horrified that you will attempt to make the supreme court change it's mind on these issues, while conservatives are more positive." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2049, "fields": { "priority": -1, "description": "It's time Rubio. The Presidential Debates. It is a bit different due to the pandemic, but do you want to debate Bernie Sanders about the issues pressing the American people?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2051, "fields": { "description": "Asian-American hate crimes have been increasing rapidly since the start of the pandemic, and people are wanting an answer from you on this issue. What will you do about the rise in Asian-American hate crimes & bullying?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2053, "fields": { "description": "What is your stance on gun control, and what steps will you make with guns in your second term?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2055, "fields": { "description": "Bernie Sanders is gaining significant momentum off a lot of different groups that do & should not fit together, young voters, blue collar workers, Native Americans & even some rural voters. You need to stop this immediately." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2057, "fields": { "description": "In the midst of the COVID Pandemic, mail in voting has became a very partisan issue, with libertarians on both sides not supporting it, while people concerned about people being infected support this measure. Some groups also say mail in ballots can be 'rigged' or 'fraudulent'." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2059, "fields": { "description": "4 years. All for this. Your legacy will be proven tonight, will America be guided by the establishment or populists, will Bernie unleash a socialist tirade on the nation, or will you survive? Where will you go to win in the closing days of the campaign?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2061, "fields": { "description": "put description here" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2063, "fields": { "description": "put description here" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2065, "fields": { "description": "put description here" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2067, "fields": { "description": "put description here" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2069, "fields": { "description": "put description here" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2071, "fields": { "description": "put description here" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2073, "fields": { "description": "Due to your hawkish stances resembling that of Bush, Bernie Sanders has made the ultimate people's dream ticket - Sanders/Gabbard. Tulsi Gabbard addresses the DNC, saying 'This is the ticket of peace and principle', what do we do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2075, "fields": { "description": "Bernie Sanders has selected Senator Tammy Baldwin as his running mate. Democrats hope Baldwin strengthens the ticket in the Midwest and helps Sanders reconnect with labor voters, union households, and skeptical working-class Democrats. How does the campaign respond?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2077, "fields": { "description": "Bernie Sanders has named former Housing Secretary Julián Castro as his running mate. Democrats say the pick strengthens Latino outreach and broadens the ticket in the Southwest. Republicans are already arguing that it shows just how much immigration is going to matter in this race. How do you answer?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2079, "fields": { "description": "The Democratic convention has just ended, and Bernie Sanders has named Senator Elizabeth Warren his running mate. Warren gives the ticket a more polished look, and Democrats are already saying she helps with Progressives. How does the campaign respond?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2081, "fields": { "description": "Bernie Sanders has tapped Missouri Senator Jason Kander as his running mate. Democrats are calling it an appeal to veterans, moderates, and voters in the Heartland who might otherwise tune Sanders out. What is the response?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2085, "fields": { "description": "This administration has become extremely hawkish, and top military advisors, are suggesting to strike at Cuba. Overthrow the Communist regime there, and bring it into the U.S. . What will you do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2087, "fields": { "description": "Your administration has been very hawkish foreign policy wise, and advisors are suggesting a regime change operation in Venezuela, to overthrow Maduro and bring capitalism & democracy back to Venezuela. What will you do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2089, "fields": { "description": "The Minimum Wage is an important issue nowadays, especially due to the fact it has stayed as a measly $7.25 an hour since 2009. Are you planning to increase this in a second term, and how much by?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2072, "fields": { "description": "Climate Change is a rising issue for many folks, and people are wanting action now on the climate, what will you do regarding this?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 2074, "fields": { "description": "Justin Amash, with his VP RFK Jr, has been rising rapidly in the polls due to your authoritarian policies, especially regarding COVID. What will your response to this be?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 51603, "fields": { "description": "The 2018 midterms are here, and the party is split between people who want to run on your record and people who just want to keep their heads down, although the latter seem to be more common with how you've governed. What kind of message should Republicans run on?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 52165, "fields": { "description": "Now that the midterms are behind you, Congress wants to know what your next big push is. What should the administration make its priority?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 52247, "fields": { "description": "After your caving to the non-interventionist crowd, China are planning to invade Taiwan. Hong Kong also have been recently forcibly captured by China in this attack on democracy in the Pacific. What will you do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 52397, "fields": { "description": "The warnings have came to a boiling point - China has attacked the island of Taiwan. The whole world is watching what could be WW3. What will you do in this time of crisis?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 52865, "fields": { "description": "The 2018 midterms are here, and the party is split between people who want to run on your record and people who just want to keep their heads down. What kind of message should Republicans run on?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 53005, "fields": { "description": "The 2018 midterms are here, and the party is split between people who want to run on your record and people who just want to keep their heads down. What kind of message should Republicans run on?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 53145, "fields": { "description": "Ruth Bader Ginsburg has just died, and with this you could make the court more conservative than it has been in decades. It's up to you now Rubio, do you want to motivate the base or appeal to moderates?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 53239, "fields": { "description": "Ruth Bader Ginsburg has just died, and with this you could make the court more conservative than it has been in decades. It's up to you now Rubio, do you want to motivate the base or appeal to moderates?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 53448, "fields": { "description": "The Republican convention is coming up, and the campaign wants one big speaker to set the tone. Who should get the main slot?" } } ]; campaignTrail_temp.answers_json = [ { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5024, "fields": { "question": 2015, "description": "Run on the record. The economy is moving, the country is calmer than it was in 2016, and Republicans should not act embarrassed about governing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5025, "fields": { "question": 2015, "description": "Let local candidates do their own thing. Not every Senate race needs a presidential cameo, and not every House candidate wants to be dragged into a national fight." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5026, "fields": { "question": 2015, "description": "Make the election about stopping Democrats. Higher taxes, more investigations, and a lot of cable news melodrama. That should be enough to wake up the base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5033, "fields": { "question": 2023, "description": "America should stand clearly with the people of Hong Kong. Freedom and self-government are values worth defending." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5034, "fields": { "question": 2023, "description": "We should support democratic values, but avoid unnecessary escalation. The goal is to keep pressure on Beijing while maintaining stability." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5035, "fields": { "question": 2023, "description": "China has taken advantage of America for too long. We should pair support for Hong Kong with a tougher overall approach toward Beijing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5040, "fields": { "question": 2037, "description": "Let's go for the new senator from Missouri, Josh Hawley! He can rile the base up like no one else. Give him every second of that main slot." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5041, "fields": { "question": 2037, "description": "The Governor of Georgia Brian Kemp would be a great way to show southerners we will not forget them and will fight for them in my second term, give him the slot!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5042, "fields": { "question": 2037, "description": "Let's rally the Black Voters we have been gaining the last 4 years with our own - Tim Scott. Go on the attack and prove that we are the multi-racial party fighting for justice reform." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5043, "fields": { "question": 2037, "description": "How about I do the speech, we have had a very successful 4 years and I think I would be best to emphasise this and the New American Century we are building together." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5048, "fields": { "question": 2031, "description": " Reopen cautiously, phase by phase, and let public health data guide the process. People need confidence that the country is not just guessing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5049, "fields": { "question": 2031, "description": "Reopen aggressively and trust Americans to make smart decisions. The economy cannot stay shut down forever." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5050, "fields": { "question": 2031, "description": "Let governors drive most of the reopening decisions, with the federal government setting broad guidelines and backing them up with resources." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5051, "fields": { "question": 2031, "description": "The virus is basically overblown at this point, so we should open everything immediately and stop worrying about it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5063, "fields": { "question": 2021, "description": "Nikki Haley has been a loyal partner in this administration. Her foreign policy experience and broad appeal make her the obvious choice." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5064, "fields": { "question": 2021, "description": "Haley represents the future of the Republican Party. She's proven herself on the world stage and can help expand our coalition." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5067, "fields": { "question": 2035, "description": "This is a moment for calm and honesty. The protests are coming from real anger, and the police need to be held to a higher standard. We can support law enforcement without pretending every department is perfect. We need to address their concerns." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5068, "fields": { "question": 2035, "description": "The right answer is both order and reform. Peaceful protest is part of America, but looting and violence cannot be excused either. Push police reform, back the peaceful demonstrators, and crack down on the chaos." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5069, "fields": { "question": 2035, "description": "Send in the Guard if cities start falling apart, and make it clear that nobody gets to burn down neighborhoods in the name of protest. The reforms can come later. Right now, people want stability." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5070, "fields": { "question": 2035, "description": "This is getting blown way out of proportion by the media and activist groups. Most Americans are tired of being lectured by people who think every problem is solved by tearing everything down." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5071, "fields": { "question": 2019, "description": "Keep a strong American presence in Afghanistan and keep pressure on the Taliban and terrorist groups. Leaving just to look good on CNN is how presidents get remembered for the wrong reasons." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5072, "fields": { "question": 2019, "description": "Start drawing down our forces, but do it carefully and with conditions. The American people are tired of forever wars, and they are not wrong to be." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5073, "fields": { "question": 2019, "description": "Make it clear that America will not blink. Our enemies should know that if they test us, they are going to regret it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5083, "fields": { "question": 2025, "description": "Bernie Sanders is going to drag the Democrats left and force them into a very expensive debate about socialism, taxes, and government control. We should be ready for that fight." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5084, "fields": { "question": 2025, "description": "Democrats are going to try to make this about personality instead of policy. We should keep the focus on jobs, growth, and what this administration has actually done." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5085, "fields": { "question": 2025, "description": "If Sanders keeps gaining, the Democrats may end up with a ticket that looks a lot more radical than people expect. That opens up real opportunities in the suburbs and the Eastern Seaboard." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5086, "fields": { "question": 2039, "description": "Completely open, no rules in place. We have got to have our supporters be there and free. Mask rules won't be in place and we will carry on as normal." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5087, "fields": { "question": 2039, "description": "We need to rally, but in person rallies are not safe right now. Let's go onto the phones, computers & laptops of every American & stream my speeches on Instagram, Facebook & Twitter!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5088, "fields": { "question": 2039, "description": "Let's opt for the same style Bernie is doing - masks on - but still in person. I think we could do well with this approach, even get Dr Fauci to speak at one of our rallies! " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5089, "fields": { "question": 2039, "description": "Let's do drive-in rallies, let our supporters bring their cars to our rallies and honk their horns when I get to a specific issue!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5090, "fields": { "question": 2029, "description": "Pass a large relief package with direct support for workers, families, and small businesses. The government has to step in before people get crushed." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5091, "fields": { "question": 2029, "description": "Target the aid carefully. Protect workers, keep small businesses afloat, and avoid turning the crisis into a permanent spending spree." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5092, "fields": { "question": 2029, "description": "Focus on payroll protection and short-term relief, then get the economy open again as fast as possible. America cannot stay frozen forever." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5097, "fields": { "question": 2033, "description": "The thing is, Harris is not just left wing, she is more aligned with our common sense vision on multiple issues, we could emphasize this in certain ads to drive a wedge between her and the democrat base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5098, "fields": { "question": 2033, "description": "Harris may look like a moderate on TV, but she still belongs to the same Democratic machine that lost touch with working Americans years ago. We've been fighting for working Americans these 4 years and will for another 4." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5099, "fields": { "question": 2033, "description": "Kamala Harris is the kind of pick that sounds good to consultants and cable news panels. Voters in the real world are still going to have to live with Bernie Sanders. Let's also attack Kamala on her far left stances as Senator of California." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5101, "fields": { "question": 2027, "description": "Treat this as a serious threat immediately. Expand testing, tighten travel screening, and get the federal government moving before the problem gets bigger." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5102, "fields": { "question": 2027, "description": "Take aggressive steps early, but keep the message calm. The country needs competence, not panic." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5111, "fields": { "question": 2041, "description": "Let's secure a group that is morally conservative and shifting toward us, Hispanics. I say we campaign in Arizona, Nevada, New Mexico & even a surprise trip to LA!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5112, "fields": { "question": 2041, "description": "Let's campaign in the midwest, we need to boost our appeal with autoworkers & blue collars. Michigan, Wisconsin, Iowa & Minnesota it is!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5113, "fields": { "question": 2041, "description": "I think we go and rally the base in big population centres like Texas, Miami, California & New York. We can compete with Bernie's rallies by doing this strategy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5114, "fields": { "question": 2045, "description": "I think we wait till the people have voted in this election, as McConnell did in 2016, to respect the people. When people show that they want this, it means a lot more to the cause." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5115, "fields": { "question": 2045, "description": "I think we appoint someone to motivate the base, and I have the perfect pick for this - Amul Thapar - I invite you to the supreme court!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5116, "fields": { "question": 2045, "description": "I think we appoint someone to motivate the base, and I have the perfect pick for this - Amy Coney Barrett - I invite you to the supreme court!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5118, "fields": { "question": 2043, "description": "Let's emphasize social conservatism, our base will love the speeches on repealing Roe v Wade & supporting school vouchers, let's emphasize this more on the trail!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5119, "fields": { "question": 2043, "description": "Let's emphasize the fact we have governed the country like a business the last 4 years and will continue to over the next 4, cutting debt and taxes simultaneously!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5120, "fields": { "question": 2043, "description": "I think we focus on the fact we are managing this pandemic well and keeping Americans safe during troubled times, and that we need strong and stable leadership NOW." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5121, "fields": { "question": 2047, "description": "On Roe, I think abortion should be a state issue again, and I don't believe abortions should happen into the second trimester. But I do believe abortion should be safe, legal & RARE. We won't be attacking Obergefell either." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5122, "fields": { "question": 2047, "description": "Abortion needs to be given back to the states, and a goal of mine in my second term is to repeal Roe. We should look at the specifics of Obergefell, but I would be open to repealing that too." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5123, "fields": { "question": 2049, "description": "We aren't going to debate - as the focus on the pandemic forces us not to this time around, although we will offer a virtual debate to Sanders' team." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5124, "fields": { "question": 2049, "description": "We will attend. Let's hammer Bernie on his radicalism and economic stances - ending private healthcare would turn our healthcare system into something resembling a communist system, with all the pros private businesses do for healthcare gone altogether. We will also attack the 'Tax the Rich' plans." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5125, "fields": { "question": 2049, "description": "Attend and attack Bernie on social issues. He is a radical on the Green New Deal, which would cause prices to skyrocket, and also supports the decriminalisation of drugs like cocaine & heroin." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5126, "fields": { "question": 2049, "description": "Attend. Let's attack Bernie on foreign policy, he would abandon Israel on day 1, be friends with Putin, abandon NATO & let China go unanswered. A Bernie presidency would ruin our status abroad." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5127, "fields": { "question": 2017, "description": "Infrastructure. Roads, bridges, ports, broadband, the stuff people actually see and use. If Washington is spending money, it ought to leave something behind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5128, "fields": { "question": 2017, "description": "Tax and budget reform. Keep the tax cuts working, but also stop pretending debt does not matter just because nobody likes talking about it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 5129, "fields": { "question": 2017, "description": "Immigration Reform. The system needs to actually work, not just be a permanent argument everyone dodges until the next election." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50000, "fields": { "question": 2001, "description": "This election was never about reliving the past -- it was about whether America would stay competitive in a changing century. We are going to rebuild our economy, modernize this country, and prove once again that the American Dream still matters. It's time to build a New American Century!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50001, "fields": { "question": 2001, "description": "The political class in Washington stopped listening to normal Americans a long time ago. I have been in Government and have seen the waste & corruption for myself. My administration is going to put working people & families first again. We won't be afraid to go bold." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50002, "fields": { "question": 2001, "description": "We are entering a dangerous and uncertain world. America needs strength again -- militarily, economically, and culturally. Weakness abroad and division at home ends today, and we can't be seen as a naive nation to the world any longer." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50003, "fields": { "question": 2001, "description": "I want to be President for every American -- Republicans, Democrats, independents, everyone. This election is over. Now comes the responsibility of governing. We are all part of America, and I hope your all ready to build this New American Century." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50005, "fields": { "question": 2003, "description": "Healthcare costs are hurting working Americans badly. I want bipartisan discussions before rushing through massive legislation. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50006, "fields": { "question": 2003, "description": "We promised repeal and replacement, and we're going to deliver quickly. Obamacare has failed millions of Americans and driven up costs across the board." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50007, "fields": { "question": 2003, "description": "We should replace Obamacare carefully and responsibly. Americans deserve reforms that lower costs without creating chaos for families already relying on the current system." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50008, "fields": { "question": 2003, "description": "Healthcare reform shouldn't just be about repeal. We need a conservative reform agenda that expands access, supports families, and encourages innovation." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50009, "fields": { "question": 2005, "description": "We should keep putting forward judges like Neil Gorsuch, people who understand the Constitution, respect the limits of government, and do not think the court is some kind of elected legislature." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50010, "fields": { "question": 2005, "description": "We need conservative judges, no question, but I do not want every nomination fight to turn into a total circus. If we can confirm strong judges, whether conservative or more moderate and keep the country moving, that is better than constant drama." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50011, "fields": { "question": 2005, "description": "We should be building a bench of younger originalists who will shape the country for decades. This is not just about one seat, it is about the next generation of the court." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50012, "fields": { "question": 2005, "description": "The Constitution matters, life matters, and limited government matters. I am not backing down from that because a few people in Washington get uncomfortable." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50013, "fields": { "question": 2007, "description": "Britain needs a strong partner, not a lecture, and whatever Britain looks like after Brexit, America should be prepared to work with it. But we also need to stop pretending the old international order runs on autopilot." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50014, "fields": { "question": 2007, "description": "America should stand with its allies, keep NATO strong, and make clear that Vladimir Putin is not a misunderstood genius, he is a threat. We lead by being serious, not by retreating." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50015, "fields": { "question": 2007, "description": "We need to stay engaged, but we do not need to spend every year rushing into somebody else’s crisis. America should lead with discipline, not just instinct." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50016, "fields": { "question": 2007, "description": "Britain is sorting out its own mess, and we should not act like every political problem in Europe is now our problem. Focus on American interests first, and let London deal with London." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50017, "fields": { "question": 2009, "description": "Keep NAFTA, push TPP, and make the case that America should write the rules of global trade instead of sitting on the sidelines. If we do this right, American exporters win." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50018, "fields": { "question": 2009, "description": "I think NAFTA is fine how it is, but TPP should not move forward unless it actually protects American workers. Trade can work, but only if it is on our terms." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50019, "fields": { "question": 2009, "description": "Kill TPP, we also need to have a serious look at parts of NAFTA if that is what it takes. We have spent too long pretending that free trade means anything when were losing to our enemies like China." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50020, "fields": { "question": 2009, "description": "We need a trade strategy that protects workers, punishes cheaters, and still keeps America competitive. That means leverage, enforcement, and a lot less Beltway theater." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50021, "fields": { "question": 2011, "description": "Pass the tax cut bill and keep it simple. Lower rates, reward work, reward investment, and let the private economy do what it does best." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50022, "fields": { "question": 2011, "description": "If we are going to pass a big bill, then make it count. Tax relief, infrastructure, and some serious investment in roads, ports, and the stuff that actually keeps the economy moving." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50023, "fields": { "question": 2011, "description": "We should use this moment to get serious about the budget. Cut spending where we can, keep the tax relief, and stop pretending debt does not matter just because people in Washington do not want to talk about it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50024, "fields": { "question": 2013, "description": "We should focus on merit-based immigration, visa enforcement, and a border strategy that is serious but not cruel. America can be strong without acting broken." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50025, "fields": { "question": 2013, "description": "We need a real immigration reform bill, one that secures the border, fixes the legal system, and gives law-abiding families a path forward." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50026, "fields": { "question": 2013, "description": "Secure the border first, tighten enforcement, expand E-Verify, and end the nonsense. A country without borders is not a country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50405, "fields": { "question": 2015, "description": "We must protect our House Majority, let's campaign in California & NY and protect vulnerable seats." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50407, "fields": { "question": 2017, "description": "Criminal justice reform. We can be tough on crime and still fix the parts of the system that are clearly broken. That is not weakness, it is common sense." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50552, "fields": { "question": 2019, "description": "Frankly, Afghanistan is someone else's problem now. We should leave immediately and stop worrying about what happens afterward." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50617, "fields": { "question": 2023, "description": "Hong Kong is an internal Chinese matter. America has more important things to worry about." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50668, "fields": { "question": 2025, "description": "Honestly, I think the Democrats are going to nominate somebody very mainstream and very boring, and we should just ignore the whole thing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50739, "fields": { "question": 2027, "description": "Work with governors, hospitals, and the private sector to build a coordinated response. Washington should lead, but not pretend it can do everything alone." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50740, "fields": { "question": 2027, "description": "The media is blowing this way out of proportion. We should stop freaking people out and move on." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50787, "fields": { "question": 2029, "description": "Just cut taxes again and hope the market does the rest." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50992, "fields": { "question": 2081, "description": "Kander is the most obvious attempt yet to make Sanders look less like a revolution and more like a normal campaign. That disguise only goes so far. Let's mostly ignore Kander and focus our attacks on Sanders." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50994, "fields": { "question": 2081, "description": "Let's just attack Kander on the fact he is still a Democrat and will betray real Americans on day 1, no matter what he says he is on the ticket with a radical." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 50996, "fields": { "question": 2081, "description": "Damn. Can't we just fundraise some more money off our megadonors?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51000, "fields": { "question": 2079, "description": "Warren is very uncharismatic - we should use this to our advantage, and continue to attack Sanders as normal." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51001, "fields": { "question": 2079, "description": "With Warren, she is unpopular even in her own state, let's try & narrow the margin there a bit. And attack her stances on certain issues." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51002, "fields": { "question": 2079, "description": "Let's attack Warren ruthlessly on her progressive stances on the economy, businesses would flee under her government-controlling bureaucracy!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51006, "fields": { "question": 2051, "description": "We need to stop this immediately - I think all parties can condemn this violence, and we condemn this in all ways." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51007, "fields": { "question": 2051, "description": "People are angry about COVID - but these hateful attacks aren't the answer, and China did start this virus, yes, but it isn't Chinese-Americans fault for that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51008, "fields": { "question": 2051, "description": "China is responsible for COVID, and we need to go on the attack with anyone who has sympathy with them." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51009, "fields": { "question": 2051, "description": "We have made hundreds of thousands of new Asian-American jobs in this term - let's emphasize that instead" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51016, "fields": { "question": 2077, "description": "Castros policies on immigration are a threat to our country - Bombard the border states & rust belt with ads showing how him & Sanders supporting open borders would decimate jobs" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51017, "fields": { "question": 2077, "description": "Castro helps Bernie with open border & immigration policies because the Democratic base knows it needs the issue to break its way. That does not make the rest of the ticket any less radical. We need a secure border or we won't exist as a nation." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51018, "fields": { "question": 2077, "description": "Picking Castro tells you Bernie understands he has trouble with Hispanic voters and border-state moderates. He is trying to patch the map, not win the argument." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51024, "fields": { "question": 2075, "description": "Baldwin is even more far-fetched than Bernie! She would end all our trade deals with Comrade Bernie on day one! We should air ads all across the coasts about her trade & economic stances immediately." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51025, "fields": { "question": 2075, "description": "Baldwin may help Bernie talk to union voters, but she cannot erase the fact that the Sanders agenda is still built around massive government expansion. Let's campaign in libertarian-leaning states, promising to balance the debt." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51026, "fields": { "question": 2075, "description": "If Sanders needs Tammy Baldwin to make himself look electable, that says everything. This is still a ticket built around ideology first and coalition second. Let's try & cut Baldwin's support over the rust belt in any way we can." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51154, "fields": { "question": 2041, "description": "Focus on New England, we narrowly won New Hampshire 4 years ago and want to keep it against Bernie, let's also try & go for Maine, Connecticut & Rhode Island!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51267, "fields": { "question": 2075, "description": "I know this could be a bit... controversial but Baldwins progressive stances could be weaponised to motivate the south for us, and of course the fact..." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51604, "fields": { "question": 51603, "description": "Run on the record. The economy is moving, the country is calmer than it was in 2016, and Republicans should not act embarrassed about governing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51613, "fields": { "question": 51603, "description": "Let local candidates do their own thing. Not every Senate race needs a presidential cameo, and not every House candidate wants to be dragged into a national fight." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51622, "fields": { "question": 51603, "description": "Make the election about stopping Democrats. Higher taxes, more investigations, and a lot of cable news melodrama. That should be enough to wake up the base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 51650, "fields": { "question": 51603, "description": "We must protect our House Majority, let's campaign in California & NY and protect vulnerable seats." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52013, "fields": { "question": 2047, "description": "I really value life, so we will be looking into the specifics of what we can do regarding Roe, but we cannot do anything about Obergefell right now." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52142, "fields": { "question": 2047, "description": "Lets focus on a new culture war issue - men in women's sports. We can rally the base without making explicit promises with this strategy, and there isn't much to lose." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52166, "fields": { "question": 52165, "description": "Infrastructure. Roads, bridges, ports, broadband, the stuff people actually see and use. If Washington is spending money, it ought to leave something behind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52180, "fields": { "question": 52165, "description": "Tax and budget reform. Keep the tax cuts working, but also stop pretending debt does not matter just because nobody likes talking about it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52191, "fields": { "question": 52165, "description": "Immigration Reform. The system needs to actually work, not just be a permanent argument everyone dodges until the next election." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52213, "fields": { "question": 52165, "description": "Criminal justice reform. We can be tough on crime and still fix the parts of the system that are clearly broken. That is not weakness, it is common sense." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52248, "fields": { "question": 52247, "description": "We need to stop this immediately - Send whatever it takes to protect Taiwan - I am not having a WW3 on my hands at this crucial moment. Make China kowtow with American Strength. Democracy comes first. We will recognise the state of Taiwan, independent of China, effective immediately, and impose heavy sanctions on China in any way possible." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52261, "fields": { "question": 52247, "description": "We should support democratic values, but avoid unnecessary escalation. The goal is to keep pressure on Beijing while maintaining stability." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52265, "fields": { "question": 52247, "description": "We need to start an outright trade war with china - remove the leverage they claim by isolating them, effect immediately. This is the only way we can stop them from doing this." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52284, "fields": { "question": 52247, "description": "Immediately bring back the TPP - we need it more than ever now, just to isolate China long term and win this cold war of freedom, it's time, and we should also include India any way possible." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52398, "fields": { "question": 52397, "description": "There's only one thing - Keep Taiwan Free. \n\n\nGive them everything." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52491, "fields": { "question": 2074, "description": "Amash is a big threat to our re-election, try and get him off the ballot in the swing states. It may look bad, but most of his supporters would choose us right?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52492, "fields": { "question": 2074, "description": "Amash is mainly winning over voters due to our policies with COVID. If we moderate and open up slightly here we can gain some of his supporters without losing much." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52493, "fields": { "question": 2074, "description": "Don't address his campaign. Third parties never win states and he is just running a vanity campaign, that'll go nowhere." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52494, "fields": { "question": 2074, "description": "Attack his social views. Conservatives considering him must know his stance on drugs, he wants to legalise them all, and his foreign policy views are just stupid." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52557, "fields": { "question": 2072, "description": "We stayed in the Paris Accords when I became president, but I think we should leave it in a second term, and focus more on expanding oil& gas production." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52558, "fields": { "question": 2072, "description": "We need to have an 'all of the above' strategy on this. Don't stop domestic oil & gas immediately, but phase it out with clean energy, solar & wind. We will also make a commitment for Net-Zero by 2040, working with private enterprises." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52593, "fields": { "question": 2053, "description": "We need to definitely pass universal background checks, as this would allow innocent people to own a gun for defence, while criminals would be halted." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52594, "fields": { "question": 2053, "description": "Keep gun laws as is, they are already decided by the states and this doesn't need to be changed any time soon." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52595, "fields": { "question": 2053, "description": "Some red flag laws need to be repealed, and guns should not be restricted. An armed population is the only way to stop tryanny." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52643, "fields": { "question": 2072, "description": "Keep our current laws, and just go along with what groups like the UN say internationally. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52680, "fields": { "question": 2055, "description": "We should take his minority support from behind his back - Hispanic & Asian Americans are what we're going for, I almost won 45% of the hispanic vote in 2016, I believe we can get over 50% in this election." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52681, "fields": { "question": 2055, "description": "Women are historically democratic-leaning, but if we moderate on abortion, we could win them over. We should also start campaigning on protecting women's sports, and we should focus on suburban women." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52702, "fields": { "question": 2055, "description": "We should appeal to blue-collar workers, pledge many growth projects in the rust belt in our second term, turning it into the tech Capital of America." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52715, "fields": { "question": 2057, "description": "Mail in ballots are a safe, credible voting system, eventually during a pandemic. I would encourage this kind of voting to not be at risk of catching COVID." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52716, "fields": { "question": 2057, "description": "There are serious allegations about mail-in voting that we must investigate to keep voting fair, and we encourage anyone voting to vote in person." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52717, "fields": { "question": 2057, "description": "I would prefer everyone vote in person, but due to the pandemic, this has to be an option to protect the vulnerable. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52718, "fields": { "question": 2059, "description": "Yes. Let's go all in on the southwest, where we have room to improve, especially after our great 2018 showing with Hispanic & Asian voters. Arizona, Nevada, New Mexico & Colorado are the states we're campaigning in." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52719, "fields": { "question": 2059, "description": "Focus 100% on the Midwest. We're going to put all our energy in Minnesota, Wisconsin, Michigan, Iowa, Ohio & Pennslyvania! We will be exhausted, but it will help immensely." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52720, "fields": { "question": 2059, "description": "Let's go for big population centres so people nationwide know they won't be left out of our second term. California, Texas, Illinois & New York." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52722, "fields": { "question": 2089, "description": "Keep it at $7.25, let states decide how high it should go. A $15 minimum wage like Bernie is proposing would be unfeasible for businesses in rural areas." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52723, "fields": { "question": 2089, "description": "I think we should be generous after the pandemic, and up it to $12, with it going up by inflation every year after that. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52724, "fields": { "question": 2089, "description": "Let's up it to 10 bucks an hour by 2024, which would give small businesses time to increase wages." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52786, "fields": { "question": 2059, "description": "Our margins are being cut by Amash in the Rockies, Plains & Pacific Northwest. Visit Montana Oregon & Washington." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52793, "fields": { "question": 2073, "description": "Tulsi is a radical on foreign policy - she heaps praise for authoritarian dictators like Assad, says Propaganda for Putin & would leave our country vulnerable worldwide." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52796, "fields": { "question": 2073, "description": "We need to go full on establishment to beat Gabbard, we can't win populists when they have their dream ticket, we need to go for the coasts, whatever happens in the midwest dosent matter, we will gain 2 suburban college educated people for every 1 rural libertarian we lose." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52797, "fields": { "question": 2073, "description": "Libertarians will love this ticket, and we need to halt that immediately. Promise some policies on reducing crimes for cannabis, more relaxed gun laws, etc." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52866, "fields": { "question": 52865, "description": "Run on the record. The economy is moving, the country is calmer than it was in 2016, and Republicans should not act embarrassed about governing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52881, "fields": { "question": 52865, "description": "Let local candidates do their own thing. Not every Senate race needs a presidential cameo, and not every House candidate wants to be dragged into a national fight." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52908, "fields": { "question": 52865, "description": "Make the election about stopping Democrats. Higher taxes, more investigations, and a lot of cable news melodrama. That should be enough to wake up the base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 52962, "fields": { "question": 52865, "description": "We must protect our House Majority, let's campaign in California & NY and protect vulnerable seats." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53006, "fields": { "question": 53005, "description": "Run on the record. The economy is moving, the country is calmer than it was in 2016, and Republicans should not act embarrassed about governing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53021, "fields": { "question": 53005, "description": "Let local candidates do their own thing. Not every Senate race needs a presidential cameo, and not every House candidate wants to be dragged into a national fight." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53066, "fields": { "question": 53005, "description": "Make the election about stopping Democrats. Higher taxes, more investigations, and a lot of cable news melodrama. That should be enough to wake up the base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53146, "fields": { "question": 53145, "description": "I think we wait till the people have voted in this election, as McConnell did in 2016, to respect the people. When people show that they want this, it means a lot more to the cause." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53170, "fields": { "question": 53145, "description": "I think we appoint someone to motivate the base, and I have the perfect pick for this - Amul Thapar - I invite you to the supreme court!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53196, "fields": { "question": 53145, "description": "I think we appoint someone to motivate the base, and I have the perfect pick for this - Amy Coney Barrett - I invite you to the supreme court!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53240, "fields": { "question": 53239, "description": "I think we wait till the people have voted in this election, as McConnell did in 2016, to respect the people. When people show that they want this, it means a lot more to the cause." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53264, "fields": { "question": 53239, "description": "I think we appoint someone to motivate the base, and I have the perfect pick for this - Amul Thapar - I invite you to the supreme court!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53290, "fields": { "question": 53239, "description": "I think we appoint someone to motivate the base, and I have the perfect pick for this - Amy Coney Barrett - I invite you to the supreme court!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53333, "fields": { "question": 53145, "description": "Our conservative nominees will get nowhere, so maybe we should just go for Merrick Garland. The base will hate this move, but it's the only way we get someone through." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53358, "fields": { "question": 53239, "description": "Let's motivate our base to levels never seen before, and nominate the ultimate Conservative Warrior - James Ho. I welcome you to the Supreme Court!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53397, "fields": { "question": 2087, "description": "Do what the advisors say, and start this operation. I will follow their command and not do any unrational decisions." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53398, "fields": { "question": 2087, "description": "We need to make sure no rebel guerrillas appear, and make sure Venezuela is both free & stable. Respect their ways, but do not allow socialism to grow there any longer." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53399, "fields": { "question": 2087, "description": "Don't leave no stone unturned. We need to capture Maduro, install a Pro-Democracy US aligned government, and banish communism to the relics of history immediately." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53424, "fields": { "question": 2085, "description": "There's only one decision - I have been waiting all my life - Every Cuban-American has - Send the army into Cuba to liberate it from the Communist Oppressors. We will do it swiftly and securely." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53449, "fields": { "question": 53448, "description": "You know how Obama shook the world in 2004 at the DNC? How about we bring one of our rising stars - John James. Have the floor." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53469, "fields": { "question": 53448, "description": "The Governor of Georgia Brian Kemp would be a great way to show southerners we will not forget them and will fight for them in my second term, give him the slot!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53478, "fields": { "question": 53448, "description": "Let's rally the Black Voters we have been gaining the last 4 years with our own - Tim Scott. Go on the attack and prove that we are the multi-racial party fighting for justice reform." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 53495, "fields": { "question": 53448, "description": "How about I do the speech, we have had a very successful 4 years and I think I would be best to emphasise this and the New American Century we are building together." } } ]; campaignTrail_temp.states_json = [ { "model": "campaign_trail.state", "pk": 6000, "fields": { "name": "Alabama", "abbr": "AL", "electoral_votes": 9, "popular_votes": 2123372, "poll_closing_time": 120, "winner_take_all_flg": 1, "election": 20 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.state", "pk": 6001, "fields": { "name": "Alaska", "abbr": "AK", "electoral_votes": 3, "popular_votes": 318608, "poll_closing_time": 420, "winner_take_all_flg": 1, "election": 20 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.state", "pk": 6002, "fields": { "name": "Arizona", "abbr": "AZ", "electoral_votes": 11, "popular_votes": 2604657, "campaign_trail.answer_score_state", "pk": 53501, "fields": { "answer": 53495, "state": 6027, "candidate": 1001, "affected_candidate": 1001, "state_multiplier": 0.03 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_score_state", "pk": 53502, "fields": { "answer": 53495, "state": 6042, "candidate": 1001, "affected_candidate": 1001, "state_multiplier": 0.03 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_score_state", "pk": 53503, "fields": { "answer": 53449, "state": 6003, "candidate": 1001, "affected_candidate": 1001, "state_multiplier": -0.02 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_score_state", "pk": 53504, "fields": { "answer": 53449, "state": 6035, "candidate": 1001, "affected_candidate": 1001, "state_multiplier": -0.02 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_score_state", "pk": 53505, "fields": { "answer": 53449, "state": 6041, "candidate": 1001, "affected_candidate": 1001, "state_multiplier": -0.02 } } ]; campaignTrail_temp.answer_feedback_json = [ { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2503, "fields": { "answer": 50025, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the strongest answer if you want to sound like a reform future focused conservative instead of a conservative activist. It can work well in the suburbs and with Hispanic voters. Expect a boost in the southwest!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2504, "fields": { "answer": 50026, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is a very hardline conservative answer. It will go over very well with the base, especially the voters who want to hear you sound like you mean it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2513, "fields": { "answer": 50009, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the safest answer with the base. Mitch McConnell will love it, the Federalist Society will love it, and half the conservative legal world will start acting like you just saved civilization." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2514, "fields": { "answer": 50010, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your stated position is one that makes suburban Republicans nod instead of panic. It is less red meat than the base wants, but it keeps you looking serious instead of feral." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2515, "fields": { "answer": 50011, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Very movement-conservative, very long game. The legal nerds will be thrilled, and your opponents will start muttering about \"the courts\" in every interview." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2516, "fields": { "answer": 50006, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Conservatives and Republican activists strongly approve of this stance. However, Democrats immediately begin attacking your plan as reckless, and nervous moderates worry about losing coverage." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2517, "fields": { "answer": 50007, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This cautious approach reassures moderates and suburban voters. Some conservatives are frustrated by the slower timeline, but it helps avoid major political backlash." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2518, "fields": { "answer": 50008, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your position reinforces your image as a policy-focused conservative reformer. It helps distinguish you from traditional Republicans, though some voters find the message too vague." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2519, "fields": { "answer": 50005, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Independent voters appreciate the willingness to negotiate, but conservative media figures immediately begin questioning your commitment to Republican priorities. Critics say you sound more like Obama than yourself now." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2520, "fields": { "answer": 50017, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the pro-business, pro-global trade path. The Chamber of Commerce crowd will be happy, but some of your own voters will act like you just invited Bill Clinton to the family barbecue." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2521, "fields": { "answer": 50018, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your answer here is probably your most politically safe response. It sounds like a president trying to keep the base and the suburbs at the same table. Although you could have been bold here." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2522, "fields": { "answer": 50019, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the heavy populist answer. It will absolutely light up the Rust Belt and make economists start sweating through their collars. Expect blue collar workers to start shifting red." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2523, "fields": { "answer": 50020, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This one sounds the most reasonable if you want to be thoughtful rather than angry. It gives you room to appeal to business Republicans without looking like you forgot who your voters are. You are being purposely vague here however." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2524, "fields": { "answer": 5024, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the safest answer if you want the White House to sound like it knows what it is doing. It helps down-ballot Republicans stay tied to a decent economy, and eventually Republicans increase their majority in the senate to 52-48, flipping MO, IN & ND, while losing TX & NV. The house narrowly goes democrat, 218-216, with chaos unfolding for months as Pelosi barely is able to hold together the Democrats." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2525, "fields": { "answer": 5025, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "A smart answer if you want to protect vulnerable candidates in swing districts. It is less flashy, but it stops the race from becoming one giant referendum on you every five minutes. Eventually Republicans increase their majority in the senate to 52-48, flipping MO, IN & ND, while losing TX & NV. The house narrowly goes democrat, 218-216, with chaos unfolding for months as Pelosi barely is able to hold together the Democrats." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2526, "fields": { "answer": 5026, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the classic red-meat midterm line. Not subtle, not fancy, but very effective if you want people in the base yelling \"Let’s go\" at their phones. Eventually Republicans increase their majority in the senate to 52-48, flipping MO, IN & ND, while losing TX & NV. The house narrowly goes democrat, 218-216, with chaos unfolding for months as Pelosi barely is able to hold together the Democrats, and a unified GOP even get Kevin McCarthy as speaker for a few months." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2530, "fields": { "answer": 50021, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the cleanest pro-growth policy. Wall Street will smile, the donor class will call it \"serious,\" and your critics will say you handed the country a spreadsheet. The 'Rubio Tax Cuts' pass 52-48 in the Senate." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2531, "fields": { "answer": 50022, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is a very good middle path. It gives you something tangible to sell in places like Ohio and Pennsylvania without sounding like you are trying to become Paul Ryan in a necktie. You easily manage to pass this bill, 56-44 in the Senate with some democrats voting for it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2532, "fields": { "answer": 50023, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your going the deficit hawk lane. Budget people will love it, your base will respect it, and you have recovered credibility with lots of libertarians. The 'Gov. Efficiency Bill' passes narrowly 51-49 in the Senate." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2533, "fields": { "answer": 5033, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Human rights advocates applaud your stance, while Chinese officials condemn the remarks. Expect a boost with Asian-Americans in key states." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2534, "fields": { "answer": 5034, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "You attempt to strike a careful balance between principle and pragmatism." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2535, "fields": { "answer": 5035, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your administration is linking human rights concerns with broader economic and strategic competition with this response. Expect a small boost in the Midwest for the Anti-China stance" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2536, "fields": { "answer": 5040, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Selecting Hawley helps immensely in forgotten areas, and rallies the base. Although he does make a few subtle digs at your administration, especially on immigration." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2537, "fields": { "answer": 5042, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Tim Scott, in a calm manner talks about his faith & upbringing, saying about the 'future of the party' and that Rubio deserves another 4 years. A great speech." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2541, "fields": { "answer": 5048, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Probably the most defensible answer. It keeps you from looking reckless and gives the campaign a serious, managerial tone." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2542, "fields": { "answer": 5049, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This will please business conservatives and the anti-lockdown crowd. It also gives opponents a very clear line of attack." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2543, "fields": { "answer": 5050, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "A solid middle route. It keeps you from taking all the blame while still sounding like somebody in charge." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2550, "fields": { "answer": 50014, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Classic Rubio hawkishness. This one plays well with national security voters, and gets a nod from every foreign policy type in Washington who still thinks speeches should be fiercely pro democracy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2551, "fields": { "answer": 50015, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the most adult response to this question. It keeps you conservative, but not reckless, which is exactly the sort of thing donors and suburban voters like hearing. Europe also seems happy with your new stance." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2552, "fields": { "answer": 5063, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "The campaign emphasizes stability, competence, and continuity heading into a turbulent election year." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2553, "fields": { "answer": 5064, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "You frame the ticket as a modern conservative partnership capable of winning over suburban voters and younger Republicans." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2555, "fields": { "answer": 5069, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Strong law-and-order energy. Works if you want your campaign to sound tough, but it risks coming off cold if the tone is too heavy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2556, "fields": { "answer": 5070, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Bad answer. It sounds blunt, but not in a good way. More like you just stepped on a rake in front of live TV." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2557, "fields": { "answer": 5071, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "You are leaning into the old-school national security lane here. Hawkish voters and foreign policy traditionalists will like the steadiness, and it keeps you from looking like you are folding under pressure. The downside is obvious. People who are sick of the war are going to hear “stay the course” and be repulsed by your policy here." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2558, "fields": { "answer": 5072, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This gives you the cleanest middle path. You are not acting like the world is a safe place, but you are also not pretending Afghanistan has to stay on the front page forever. It should play well with voters who want competence more than chest-thumping, and it keeps you from sounding like you are running for defense secretary." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2559, "fields": { "answer": 5073, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "The base will eat this up. It sounds tough, it sounds confident, and it keeps the campaign moving in a very simple direction. The risk is that it can start to feel a little cartoonish if you stack too many answers like this. It works best when you want a sharp contrast with The Democrats later." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2568, "fields": { "answer": 5083, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Good read on the race. It sets up your anti-socialism messaging and makes the general election feel like a real clash of ideas." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2569, "fields": { "answer": 5084, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "A steady answer. It keeps you above the noise and avoids giving Bernie extra oxygen." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2570, "fields": { "answer": 5085, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Smart and strategic. It gives you a way to frame the Democratic nominee before the general election really starts." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2571, "fields": { "answer": 5086, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Why, just why Robo Rubio? You eventually start a COVID outbreak in Scranton, Pennslyvania & it is all over the news. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2572, "fields": { "answer": 5087, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "You... aren't that popular online, and people call you demeaning nicknames like 'Robo Rubio' and 'Marco Roboto'. You eventually drop this and just do drive in rallies, which go a bit better." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2573, "fields": { "answer": 5088, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Bernie's rallies are just more energetic than yours, and Dr. Fauci declines the invite, and all this has done is hurt your polling with libertarians, who have been going to Justin Amash/Robert Kennedy Jr." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2574, "fields": { "answer": 5089, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "These drive-in rallies are probably your best bet, they are a bit weird, but seeing the cars of all your faithful supporters makes you happy for it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2575, "fields": { "answer": 5090, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is the broad rescue package lane. It gives you the best chance of looking proactive and responsive. These direct payments really help you polling." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2576, "fields": { "answer": 5091, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "A very fiscally conservative answer if you want to sound cautious rather than reckless. It should play well with both donors and suburban voters, but could increase working class discontent." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2577, "fields": { "answer": 5092, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Strong if you want to combine fiscal caution with a pro-growth message. It works especially well if you plan to emphasize reopening later." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2581, "fields": { "answer": 5097, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is great if you want to split the democratic coalition - but be careful not to be too obvious or they may just unite to spite you." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2582, "fields": { "answer": 5098, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "You are lazer focused on your working class voters with this answer. Expect a boost in these states" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2583, "fields": { "answer": 5099, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your campaign organisers go on a rampage with TV ads talking about Kamala allowing transgender criminals to get free surgeries, and voting as left as Bernie Sanders. Your campaign even launch an ad stating Kamala is for 'they them', not you. The effects wait to be seen." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2585, "fields": { "answer": 5101, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "The most responsible answer on the page. It makes you look like you take the crisis seriously instead of hoping it disappears on cable news." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2586, "fields": { "answer": 5102, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Very strong politically. You sound like a president trying to manage the situation instead of performing for the cameras." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2595, "fields": { "answer": 5111, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your rallies in this region go very well, the crowd seem pleased with your accomplishments the last 4 years, and the rally in LA even gets Arnold Schwarzenegger to say 'Hasta la vista Bernie!'." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2596, "fields": { "answer": 5112, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Autoworkers find your message a bit boring and ignorant of what they want - your visits do alright in suburban areas though." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2597, "fields": { "answer": 5113, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Your rallies are generally decent but not attended too much, you do get a boost in these states however and meet someone called Lee Zeldin in New York who seems like a promising hope for the GOP there in future." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2598, "fields": { "answer": 5114, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "This is undoubtedly a moderation of your position here - but suburbs and moderates are happy with this, to the detriment of the base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2599, "fields": { "answer": 5115, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "The senate approve Thapar, 57-43. The base are motivated, but moderates aren't too pleased. Thapar is more moderate than some picks which may help too." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 2600, "fields": { "answer": 5116, "candidate": 1001, "answer_feedback": "Amy is approved 53-47 in the senate, with a few moderate republicans dissenting, but McConnell manages to keep the majority together.
